title: Aurora, 33573, Palm Pals Juicy Strawberry 5In, Soft Toy, Red
features: From Aurora's highly popular Palm Pals Collection
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials
Adorable Juicy Strawberry cuddly toy that is filled with beans
Children will love this cute and hugely collectable character
description: This cute Juicy Strawberry fits into the palm of your hand, she is full of beans which makes her super soft and cuddly. Her body is a soft red and green plush material. This is a super cute playful Strawberry soft toy. Palm Pals make great gifts for any occasion, whether it is for a birthday or as a general gift, everyone will fall in love with this adorable Strawberry fruit. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products.
